---
title: 'Candy Cane Earings'
date: '2012-06-11T07:07:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8965197487684633219'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/candy-cane-earings.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'TCC Jewelry'
  - 'Christmas'
---

<br />
<div style="text-align: left;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" style="text-align: -webkit-auto;" target="">Home</a></div>
<br />
<br />
<h3 style="text-align: center;">
 Candy Cane Earings</h3>
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
      Candy Canes do grow on trees!!!!</h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/tc-jewelry.html">Back to TC&amp;C Jewelry</a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-f58d35e9317a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="480" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-84fec8ed0520.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0664-7dbcdef9718c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0664-6d72d9f45a20.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0660-47ff1874de7e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0660-5fe4c00578fb.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0662-febf3df4fa75.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0662-c4171ed01038.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0659-9baa51dadcae.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0659-04dec31c5a89.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0666-16eb3d39e35f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0666-e8cfa12a399f.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0671-816c357b6d61.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0671-14c466e823ca.jpg" width="150" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0669-b1b911fa9010.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0669-1ee2188842f6.jpg" width="150" /></a>&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0672-96332e9fefd8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0672-574f3d3520f4.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0694-6acbdcaf4052.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0694-c1290337dbeb.jpg" width="150" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0718-4af42704eb2f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0718-2821c4e66109.jpg" width="200" /></a>&nbsp;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0717-85fa94f3a649.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0717-8d7cf4cefee0.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0708-dc0d00b58db9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0708-10e28efb4b79.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0692-a3ed9a45bd0c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0692-f1c6eef5474f.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0698-ea834e08c1e8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0698-3c97c94aa07a.jpg" width="150" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0713-1763a22f7173.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0713-0ee08d955db6.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0733-4decab181d7b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0733-d174b5e04204.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0724-a0f87debc2c6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0724-25487cb09f14.jpg" width="200" />&nbsp; &nbsp;</a><br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0721-84e089de5825.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0721-4a71316d1f3b.jpg" width="200" /></a><br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0727-f733cc6b41f2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0727-73f36faa8808.jpg" width="200" /></a><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0729-609f36599cef.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0729-de034cb7479f.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0736-e5dc59104ca2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0736-115d2619659f.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0739-698bd7e7be0a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0739-3c10ac438e76.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0744-aacc24949abd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0744-4f2f8996f577.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0743-cc6c996da2fc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0743-8ed8de2e9e84.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0746-61c2c1a62626.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0746-5dd1f46bf6cd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0745-e7415da401b0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0745-0989d973cdc3.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0634-d4037ffe893d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="480" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0634-2afd3edc2e1b.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/tc-jewelry.html" style="text-align: center;">Back to TC&amp;C Jewelry</a><br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe>
